title: erigeron oolepis
intro: Erigeron oolepis, also known as Fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Erigeron oolepis include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Erigeron oolepis is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in salves and creams to soothe skin irritations.
